Site: https://www.grupagotoma.pl

Type: Single-page website with anchored sections + English version (/en)

Purpose: Business landing page presenting services in e-commerce, SEO, integrations and digital marketing.

Main structure (Polish version):
- https://www.grupagotoma.pl/#o-grupie
- https://www.grupagotoma.pl/#dowiedz-sie-wiecej
- https://www.grupagotoma.pl/#gotoma-general
- https://www.grupagotoma.pl/#gotoma-software-house
- https://www.grupagotoma.pl/#codarius

English version:
- https://www.grupagotoma.pl/en/
- https://www.grupagotoma.pl/en/#about
- https://www.grupagotoma.pl/en/#choose-what-you-need
- https://www.grupagotoma.pl/en/#gotoma-general
- https://www.grupagotoma.pl/en/#gotoma-software-house
- https://www.grupagotoma.pl/en/#codarius

Reading priority:
- Treat section anchors as independent content blocks
- Homepage is a structured document, not a single summary
- Prefer service-related sections (#uslugi, #seo, #ecommerce, #integracje) over hero/header content

Do not:
- Merge all content into a single summary
- Ignore anchor structure
